FUTURE ACCOUNTING

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #8, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Sep-23-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ernest Der appeared by zoom for Debra Dolch (Petitioner).

Mr. Der stated that after the last hearing his Client informed him that Trinity had an accident, that he is withdrawing the request for authority to invest and continue to invest, that they liquidated all of the investments, that the assets are in money market accounts and that they have to see what Trinity's needs will be. The Eighth Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #8, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-11-2020 Continued To Sep-01-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ernest Der appearing by Zoom for Debra Dolch.

The Court stated that the matter is on calendar for the eighth account, expressed concerns with continued investment in mutual funds, stated that the code is clear on this issue of following the Uniform Prudent Investor Act (UPIA), that the Court needs to be a "conservator" in its approach, and that there is a difference between an index fund and an oil well with a 5% front-end load. Mr. Der stated that he received the notes late on Thursday and now that he understands the Court's position that he can continue to respond. The Court continued the Eighth Account and Report of Trustee; Petition for Trustee's Fees and Attorney's Fees and and Costs; Petition for Authority to Invest and Continue to Invest to September 1, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that it knows that the issue of the mutual funds was not in the notes.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Matter not reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jul-29-2020 Off Calendar

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Mar-26-2020 Continued To Jul-29-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
